name: Poltava Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Vorskla river and the historic Cossack-banner blue
the historic emblem of Poltava — the Poltava cross (a vexillological device of two crossed musket-and-arrow-style elements)

description: A blue field charged in the centre with a yellow Poltava cross — the eight-pointed device of the historic Poltava Cossack regiment.
history: Designed by E. Shyrai and officially adopted by resolution of the tenth session of the Poltava Oblast Council. The 'Poltava cross' charge is the historic emblem of the Poltava Cossack regiment, also appearing on the regional coat of arms.

features.role: Poltava cross — historic emblem of the Poltava Cossack regiment
